final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  input in,
  output reg [5:0] q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~rst_n) begin
      q <= 6'b0;
    end else begin
      q <= {q[4:0], in};
    end
  end

endmodule
